lint.note: Only pr-2923 changed files checked. Pre-existing repo-wide gofmt issues are out of scope for this milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The pr-replay-worker skill references a `file-group-reviewer` subagent for adversarial review, but this subagent is not available in the current environment. The skill should document a concrete fallback procedure (e.g., invoke the review skill directly) for environments that lack this subagent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker handoff for pr-2923-replay-auth-upload-priority-propagation records skillFeedback.deviations[1] showing the substitution was needed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The pr-replay-worker skill's init step references `.factory/init.sh` which is not directly executable on Windows PowerShell. The skill should provide explicit Windows-equivalent commands or a PowerShell init script.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker handoff for pr-2923-replay-auth-upload-priority-propagation records skillFeedback.deviations[0] showing the manual fallback to `go mod download`.
